pharaohs.name: Pharaohs
pharaohs.body: Scored EACH EPOCH. Player with the most pharaoh tiles: +5 VP. Player with the fewest: -2 VP. Ties: all tied players receive the bonus or penalty.
pharaohs.details: Pharaoh tiles are KEPT between epochs. Your collection grows over the game, so early pharaohs remain valuable.

gold.name: Gold
gold.body: Scored EACH EPOCH. Each Gold tile is worth 3 VP. All Gold tiles are discarded after scoring.
gold.details: Gold is simple and reliable. Good filler in auction lots.

nile_and_floods.name: Nile & Floods
nile_and_floods.body: Scored EACH EPOCH. If you have at least 1 Flood tile, score +1 VP per Nile tile AND +1 VP per Flood tile. If you have 0 Flood tiles, Nile tiles score nothing.
nile_and_floods.details: Nile tiles are KEPT between epochs but Flood tiles are DISCARDED. You must collect new Floods each epoch to activate your growing Nile collection.
nile_and_floods.extra: Scored: Every epoch | Nile: Kept | Floods: Discarded

civilizations.name: Civilizations
civilizations.body: Scored EACH EPOCH based on distinct types collected. 0 types: -5 VP. 1-2 types: 0 VP. 3 types: +5 VP. 4 types: +10 VP. 5 types: +15 VP. Types: Agriculture, Art, Astronomy, Religion, Writing.
civilizations.details: All Civilization tiles are DISCARDED after each epoch's scoring. You must rebuild your set every epoch. Having zero is costly.

monuments_variety.name: Monuments (Variety)
monuments_variety.body: Scored END OF GAME ONLY. Points for number of distinct monument types: 1 type = 1 VP. 2 = 2 VP. 3 = 3 VP. 4 = 4 VP. 5 = 5 VP. 6 = 6 VP. 7 = 10 VP. All 8 = 15 VP.
monuments_variety.details: The 8 monument types are: Fortress, Obelisk, Palace, Pyramid, Sphinx, Statue, Step Pyramid, Temple. Monuments are KEPT between all epochs.
monuments_variety.extra: Scored: End of game only | Tiles: Kept

monuments_quantity.name: Monuments (Quantity)
monuments_quantity.body: Scored END OF GAME ONLY. Points for multiples of the same type: 3 identical = 5 VP. 4 identical = 10 VP. 5+ identical = 15 VP. Score each monument type separately.
monuments_quantity.details: Combine with variety scoring. Having 3 of one type gives you 5 VP for quantity plus at least 1 VP for variety.
monuments_quantity.extra: Scored: End of game only | Tiles: Kept

god_tiles.name: God Tiles
god_tiles.body: Scored END OF GAME ONLY. Each unused God tile in your collection is worth 2 VP. Alternatively, God tiles can be spent during the game to take any one tile from the auction track.
god_tiles.details: God tiles are a flexible resource: use them for tactical advantage during the game, or hold them for guaranteed VP at the end.
god_tiles.extra: Scored: End of game only | Tiles: Kept (or spent)

sun_tokens.name: Sun Tokens
sun_tokens.body: Scored END OF GAME ONLY. The player with the highest total face value across all their suns: +5 VP. The player with the lowest total: -5 VP. Ties: all tied players share the bonus or penalty.
sun_tokens.details: Sun values shift throughout the game as you swap suns during auctions. The suns you end with may be very different from what you started with.

disasters.name: Disaster Tiles
disasters.body: Resolved IMMEDIATELY when won in an auction. Funeral: discard 2 Pharaoh tiles. Drought: discard 2 Nile or Flood tiles. Unrest: discard 1 Civilization tile. Earthquake: discard 1 Monument tile. If you don't have enough, discard what you have.
disasters.details: Disasters make some auction lots risky. Consider whether the good tiles in a lot outweigh the disaster penalty before bidding.
